title: [Feature Request] Podman run to accept kube yaml
body:
Podman currently can generate kube yaml. It would be amazing if podman could accept kube-yaml and run it locally for local development/debugging outside the cluster. Basically do a roundtrip for kube generate :)

There is some caveats on what can and can't be run. But let's assume YAML was generated by podman, so we could support backward compatibility.

comments.body:
We support this via the 'podman play kube' command
